title: PJTAU – Teaching Associate – 3 Posts

basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Teaching Associate. Candidates with M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 29-05-2026. For detailed information please visit PJTAU official website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Agronomy, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Soil Science, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Technology
